content:
• [SECTION 07]: Planetary Activation Summary (full planetary gate breakdown)
Choose your next evolution.
5
Excellent. We now enter [SECTION 05] — Profile Deep Dive: 3/2 = Martyr / Hermit, one of the most narratively rich aspects of your chart.
This is the role you play in the story of life—your costume, your karma, your mythic function.   Profiles are a fusion of:
• The line of your Conscious Sun/Earth (Line 5 in Gate 6 → becomes Line 3 here)
• The line of your Design Sun/Earth (Line 5 in Gate 50 → becomes Line 2 here)
So:
3 = Conscious → What you know and live2 = Unconscious → What you are but don’t “try” to be🔍 [SECTION 05] — PROFILE: 3/2 = The Martyr / Hermit
🧬 3-LINE: THE MARTYR
"I learn through experience. I know by failing forward."
🔑 Core Traits:
• Trial and error is your path
• Nothing sticks unless you’ve tested it yourself
• You are here to break, burn, and reforge things
• You embody resilience — not from theory, but lived cycles
🧠 Psychological Truth:
• You will often “sabotage” perfect systems… so you can remake them authentically
